start.help: Identify the correction needed and follow the correct path to determine the proper correction code.
start.note: Always review the BOL, billing details, debtor/account setup, and shipment context before selecting a correction path.

correction_type.text: What is the Correction that you are trying to do?
correction_type.help: Select the type of correction based on the request.

choices.label: Change Class / NMFC / Description / Handling Unit
Change Service Type
choices.action: EPDC

refresh_terms_pull_abt_intro.help: Use this when FBC terms are prepaid/collect and the customer is requesting to pull the shipper's or consignee's ABT, but the system did not pull it so the terms need to be refreshed.

choices.label: ABT was added before correction
choices.action: SYSM - because system failed to pull the ABT

choices.label: No comment when was ABT added
choices.action: SYSM - Due to system issue

refresh_terms_pull_abt_after_correction_.text: Is ABT account or information noted on the BOL?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: ACCR - Since this is not a biller's error and ABT is noted on the BOL

choices.label: No
choices.action: CUSI - Since this is not a biller's error and ABT is not noted on the BOL

change_terms_root.help: Select the basis of the requested terms correction.

change_terms_per_bol_who.help: Identify who made the incorrect terms entry.

choices.label: Revenue Services Agent / Revenue Quality Agent
Customer via ISPI
choices.action: CUSI

change_terms_rs_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting information that can cause confusion to the Agent?

choices.label: No
choices.action:
CAE - RSA entered incorrect Terms even if BOL is accurate

RQE - RQA entered incorrect Terms even if BOL is accurate

change_terms_rs_followed_process.text: Did the Agent followed the right process per Rebill per BOL decision Tree?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI - RSA Incorrect Terms since BOL is confusing or inaccurate

choices.label: No
choices.action:
CAE - RSA entered incorrect Terms even if BOL is accurate

RQE - RQA entered incorrect Terms even if BOL is accurate

change_terms_biller_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting information that can cause confusion to the Biller?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI - Biller entered Incorrect Terms since BOL is confusing or inaccurate

choices.label: No
choices.action: ETMS - biller entered incorrect Terms even if BOL is accurate

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: SYSM - Change terms due to incorrect TERMS entered by the SYSTEM

choices.label: Origin SC
choices.action: OPSO - If Origin SC Agent entered incorrect Terms

choices.label: Destination SC
choices.action: OPSD - If Destination SC Agent entered incorrect Terms

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: CORR ACCR - any update made on Terms or Account in attempt of payment when pro is billing correctly per BOL

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: Please follow LOA guidelines

change_terms_pull_abt.text: Is ABT noted on the BOL?

choices.label: ABT is noted within shipper/consignee ABT and biller failed to bill it
choices.action: ECD - since ABT is noted on the BOL and biller failed to bill it.

choices.label: Per BOL terms is Collect and BOL has bill to info within ABT of the shipper; biller billed collect as terms but wrong debtor
choices.action: CUSI - This is not a biller's error and biller billed the correct debtor per BOL

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: CORR LOA with Corr fee (CBLC)

change_account_per_bol_reason.text: Why are you changing an Account code?

choices.label: BOL shows an account no. or Bill to Information but was not entered by the Biller
Billing correctly per BOL but customer is requesting to use a different account no. for better/proper billing

change_account_bol_not_entered_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting/incomplete information that can cause confusion to the Biller?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI - used when changing Account Code but should not be taken against the biller since BOL has conflicting information

choices.label: No
choices.action: ECD - used when changing Account Code since Biller entered an incorrect Code not on the BOL or different from what the BOL states

change_account_better_billing_related.text: Is the account name the same or related to the debtor?

choices.label: No
choices.action: Please follow LOA guidelines

change_account_better_billing_address.text: Is the mailing address different from the current debtor?

choices.label: No
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CORR LOA with correction fee

choices.label: No
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: CORR ACCR - any update made on Terms or Account in attempt of payment when pro is billing correctly per BOL

choices.label: Continue
choices.action: Please follow LOA guidelines

change_account_pull_abt_bol_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting/incomplete information that can cause confusion to the Biller?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI - used when changing Account Code but should not be taken against the biller since BOL has conflicting information

choices.label: No
choices.action: ECD - used when changing Account Code since Biller entered an incorrect Code not on the BOL or different from what the BOL states

change_account_pull_abt_fbc_abt.text: Does the current shipper/consignee code in FBC has ABT that shows the requested account to be billed?

change_account_pull_abt_related_terms.text: Is the requested account related to the terms per BOL?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action:
Update the shipper/consignee account to pull ABT for proper billing per BOL

Use ACCR

choices.label: No
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

change_account_pull_abt_search_another.text: Look for another shipping account with ABT and update the shipper/consignee code using the account with ABT for proper billing per BOL.

choices.label: There is an account number with ABT found in A&M
No account number with ABT found in A&M
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

change_account_pull_abt_found_address.text: Is the mailing address of the requested billing account different from the current debtor?

choices.label: No
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CORR LOA with correction fee

choices.label: No
choices.action: If one of the criteria is not met, use per debtor for better billing. Use ACCR. Send to imaging team for reference

change_class_root.text: Change of Class/NMFC/Description/Handling Unit per BOL

choices.label: Revenue Services Agent / Revenue Quality Agent

change_class_biller_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting/incomplete information that can cause confusion to the Biller?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI

choices.label: No
choices.action: EWPD

change_class_rs_confusing.text: Is the BOL confusing or provide conflicting/incomplete information that can cause confusion to the Agent?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: CUSI

choices.label: No
choices.action:
CAE - Revenue Services Agent

RQE - Revenue Quality Agent

change_class_service_center.text: Which Service Center entered the incorrect Class?

choices.label: Origin Service Center / Others Service Center
choices.action: OPSO

choices.label: Destination Service Center
choices.action: OPSD

reference_edit_noted.text: Is the Reference No. that you updating noted on BOL?

choices.label: Yes
choices.action: EREF

choices.label: No
choices.action: CUSI

accessorial_update_root.text: What update are your trying to make

choices.label: Adding Accessorial that is not requested on the BOL
choices.action: ACC

choices.label: Changing Accessorial from One type to another
choices.action: EADL

choices.label: Removing of Accessorial since it was not performed
choices.action: NACC

choices.label: Adding or Removing Accessorial per Request/Instruction on BOL/Billing Mask or Changing the Debtor of Accessorial per Instruction on BOL/Billing Mask
choices.action: EACC

choices.label: Removing of Accessorial due to Service Center Error
Removing of Accessorial due to Revenue Services/Revenue Quality Agent
Debtor Change per LOA
choices.action:
LOA - change debtor of accessorial per LOA
NO CORRECTION FEE

accessorial_sc_error.text: Removing of Accessorial due to Service Center Error

choices.label: Origin Center
choices.action: OPSO - If error was made by Origin Center

choices.label: Destination Center
choices.action: OPSD - If error was made by Destination Center

accessorial_rs_error.text: Removing of Accessorial due to Revenue Services/Revenue Quality Agent

choices.label: Revenue Services Agent
choices.action: CAE - if error was done by Revenue Services Agent

choices.label: Revenue Quality Agent
choices.action: RQE - if error was done by Revenue Quality Agent

choices.label: Autorating or Manual Agreement Exception
choices.action: CORR SYSM – Autorating the PRO or applying agreement exception.

choices.label: Expired Freight Pricing or Surcharge Exception
choices.action: CORR EXPR – Expired freight pricing or surcharge exception.

choices.label: Rating correction error by Revenue Services
choices.action: CORR PRCE – Rating correction error by Revenue Services employee.

choices.label: General protection of invoice
choices.action: CORR PROT – General protection of invoice.

choices.label: PRO protected per CHT Hierarchy Update
choices.action: CORR PRHA – PRO protected per CHT hierarchy update.

choices.label: Brand new pricing within 10 days from Ship Date
choices.action: CORR SSDY – Brand new pricing and PRO rerated within 10 days from Ship Date.

choices.label: Brand new pricing after 10 days from Ship Date
choices.action: CORR YEAR – Brand new pricing and PRO rerated after 10 days from Ship Date.
